title: Server Utility Commands
description: The icon is a bird saying SUC (get it?). I'm just adding commands for my server as I see fit. This is mostly for a server with my friends. If you'd like additional functionality, feel free to message me about it. That's about it! God bless, my friends.
body:
Introducing!

# The Home and Sethome Commands

Have you ever wanted to get back to your home quickly without mining through 50 blocks of caves and lava? Well now you don't have to! With the /sethome command, players can set an arbitrary position in an arbitrary dimension as their home. Then, through the power of friendship, they can visit it at any point in time by running /home.

# The TPA, TPAhere, TPAccept, and TPACancel Commands

Have you ever wanted to trick your friend into revealing their base- I mean teleport to your friends and help them on their Minecraft adventure? Well now you can. These are easy utilities for players to interact with and teleport to one another (TPA), teleport others (TPAhere), and consent (TPAccept and TPACancel). You're welcome. Also, don't ask for different operator permissions because they have /tp.

## God bless, my friends. Jesus loves each and every one of us sinners.
